name: Party Girls || Will they invite you?
description:
"Wanna party with us?!"

While walking through a college campus during evening, you come across two, clearly excited anthro girls, a cat and a dog girl. They sound, look and behave like they're going to a wild party. The quiet college town of Rosewood Bay is known for some wild parties.

The story is set in Rosewood Bay, a quiet college town in upper New York (ish) State. I tried to make the setting authentic and a solid backdrop. To make it seem like you're actually living there and you're just a small part of the events, not as if everything is happening around the main characters. It features some small understories you could step into. Just read the newspapers around town. Let me know how much I've failed lol.

BTW. Leave reviews and suggestion for the understories, I'll add those which I feel like fit the settings!

POV: Any POV

Setting: Modern

Intro: SFW

CW: drug use (may result in dubcon), recreational drug use, violence,

Meesh is responsible for this awesome piece of art, titled "Party Chick". The scenario is also loosely based on his descriptions of the artwork.

v1.0 = bot released. Will make changes

v1.1 = Changed the initial message a bit, to make sure that the bot remembers Yumi's name
creator: typeofchilicheese
